description: Tiny 3-doc sample used by the Wave 5 synth feedback loop. Each memory is keyed to a unique query keyword so the BM25 lexical path returns a deterministic top-1 candidate per query. The corpus is fictional, public-domain safe, and intentionally small to keep the test fast.

memories.text: Gorilla protocol deployment uses rolling restarts behind a load balancer to keep request latency below 200 milliseconds.
Lemur memory consolidation merges near-duplicate memories older than thirty days into a single canonical record.
Otter observability stack exports per-query latency histograms to a Prometheus scrape endpoint every fifteen seconds.
